name: Word Blitz
description: Type falling neon words before they escape to the bottom — faster words, bigger combos, more chaos!
tagline: Blast words before they drop!
controls: Keyboard: type the falling words to blast them

name: Neon Slicer
description: Swipe and slash through glowing geometric shapes flying across the screen — chain slices for insane combos, but dodge the red bombs!
tagline: Swipe to slice, dodge the bombs!
controls: Mouse drag / touch swipe to slice shapes

name: Vortex Shift
description: Guide a glowing orb that spirals around a central vortex — click to flip inward/outward and thread through rotating neon barrier arcs before they absorb you!
tagline: Flip the spiral, dodge the rings!
controls: Click / Tap / Space to flip spiral direction

name: Chrono Pop
description: Neon circles expand outward from glowing dots — click them precisely when they hit the dashed target ring for perfect scores and chain combos!
tagline: Pop the ring at the perfect moment!
controls: Click / Tap circles when they hit the target ring

name: Circuit Blaze
description: Drag glowing energy lines to connect matching-colored nodes before their countdown expires — chain combos for massive scores but lose a life every time a node burns out!
tagline: Connect the nodes before they burn out!
controls: Click and drag from one node to a matching-color node to connect

name: Plasma Break
description: Guide a neon paddle to bounce a plasma ball through waves of glowing bricks — chain combo hits for multiplied scores, catch WIDE and MULTIBALL power-ups, and clear every brick to advance!
tagline: Smash bricks, chain combos, break free!
controls: Move mouse or touch to control the paddle

name: Data Dash
description: Navigate a glowing data stream through a cyberpunk grid — collect color-coded data nodes to grow, chain same-color nodes for explosive combo multipliers, and survive as the stream accelerates!
tagline: Grow the stream, chain the combos, don't disconnect!
controls: Arrow keys / WASD to steer, swipe on mobile

name: Echo Pulse
description: A sonar detection game — expanding pulse waves sweep the dark screen revealing hidden neon targets for a brief moment. Click them before they fade back into darkness and chain hits for massive combos!
tagline: Listen to the pulse. Strike before the silence returns.
controls: Click / Tap to hit revealed targets

name: Void Descent
description: Steer a glowing orb through neon barriers that rise from the void below — dodge left and right to thread each gap, collect cyan crystals for bonus points, and survive as speed climbs to breakneck levels!
tagline: Steer through the rising neon. Don't let the void consume you.
controls: ← → or A / D to steer | Tap left or right side on mobile

name: Neon Hopper
description: Hop a glowing diamond across 12 lanes of neon traffic in this frogger-style arcade game — time each move to thread the gaps, reach the goal for a level bonus, and survive as cars grow faster each round!
tagline: Cross the neon lanes. Don't get flattened!
controls: Arrow keys / WASD to hop | Swipe or Tap on mobile

name: Chain Burst
description: Click one floating neon bubble to trigger an explosive chain reaction — the shockwave cascades outward, popping nearby bubbles which then detonate too. Pop enough in one click to advance each level!
tagline: One click. One chain. Pure neon chaos.
controls: Click / Tap a bubble to start the chain reaction

name: Beat Drop
description: A 3-lane rhythm game — neon notes fall down cyan, magenta, and orange lanes in sync with a driving beat. Hit them at the perfect moment using A/S/D keys or tap left/center/right to rack up PERFECT combos!
tagline: Hit the notes. Feel the beat. Don't miss.
controls: A / ← · S / Space · D / → to hit lanes | Tap left, center, right on mobile

name: Neon Flood
description: A color flood-fill strategy game — pick neon colors to flood your territory outward from the corner, absorbing adjacent matching tiles. Capture 60% of the grid before your moves run out!
tagline: Pick a color. Flood the grid. Claim the neon.
controls: Click / Tap color buttons to flood your territory

name: Gravity Draw
description: Draw glowing neon lines to deflect falling physics balls into pulsing targets — guide multiple balls simultaneously, chain target hits for massive combo multipliers, and race against fading lines!
tagline: Draw lines. Bend gravity. Chain the chaos.
controls: Click and drag to draw deflection lines — guide falling balls into targets

name: Radial Blast
description: Defend a glowing central core from every direction — aim a rotating neon turret with your mouse and blast incoming polygon enemies before they breach the core. Chain kills for massive combo multipliers!
tagline: Aim. Shoot. Defend the core from all angles.
controls: Move mouse to aim turret · Click to shoot · Touch to aim and fire on mobile

name: Phase Stack
description: A neon platform slides back and forth — click or tap to drop it onto the stack below. Misaligned portions explode into particles as your tower grows. PERFECT drops keep full width while speed escalates!
tagline: Drop it. Stack it. Don't miss.
controls: Click · Tap · Space · Enter to drop the sliding platform

name: Apex Burst
description: Neon balls arc upward with gravity — click or tap them exactly at their glowing peak apex for PERFECT hits and massive combo multipliers. Miss the flash window and lose a life!
tagline: Click at the peak. Chain the PERFECT combos.
controls: Click / Tap balls at their peak apex flash

name: Flux Dash
description: A neon orb rockets through a scrolling tunnel — tap to flip gravity up or down and thread through colorful neon walls. Collect glowing crystals, chain gap combos for massive multipliers, and survive as speed escalates!
tagline: Flip gravity. Thread the gaps. Never stop.
controls: Click / Tap / Space to flip gravity direction

name: Mind Flash
description: Nine neon tiles flash a growing sequence — watch closely, then tap them back in perfect order. Chain correct rounds for massive combo multipliers as sequences grow longer and flash faster!
tagline: Watch the pattern. Repeat it perfectly.
controls: Click / Tap tiles to repeat the flashing sequence

name: Neon Maze
description: Navigate a glowing orb through a procedurally generated neon maze — collect all golden orbs before red hunters catch you! Chain quick pickups for combo multipliers as mazes grow denser each level.
tagline: Navigate the maze. Collect the orbs. Outrun the hunters.
controls: Arrow keys / WASD to navigate | Swipe on mobile

name: Neon Pinball
description: A fully-physics-driven neon pinball table — launch the glowing ball, slam flippers to ricochet off colorful bumpers, and chain hits for massive combo multipliers. Orange slingshots boost your ball, and each bumper flashes brilliantly when struck!
tagline: Launch. Flip. Smash. Chain the neon bumpers!
controls: A / ← : Left flipper · D / → : Right flipper | Tap left/right on mobile

name: Void Strike
description: Pilot a glowing neon spaceship through waves of spinning asteroid shards — rotate, thrust, and blast them apart as they split into smaller fragments. Chain kills for massive combo multipliers and survive as asteroid waves multiply each level!
tagline: Rotate. Thrust. Blast. Survive the asteroid storm.
controls: ← → Rotate · ↑ Thrust · Space Shoot | Touch zones on mobile

name: Chroma Hunt
description: All tiles share the same hue — except one slightly different shade. Find and tap the odd tile before the timer runs out! Grids grow from 2×2 to 5×5 while the color difference shrinks to near-invisible. Chain correct picks for massive combo multipliers!
tagline: Spot the odd color. Beat the clock. Chain the combos.
controls: Click / Tap the tile with the different color

name: Prism Drop
description: Neon geometric blocks cascade into the void — rotate and place them to complete glowing rows and watch them detonate in particle bursts. Chain multi-line clears for massive combo multipliers as the speed escalates each level!
tagline: Stack neon blocks. Clear the rows. Chain the combos.
controls: ← → to move · ↑ to rotate · ↓ soft drop · Space hard drop | Swipe on mobile

name: Neon Flip
description: A neon Lights Out puzzle — click any tile to flip it and all its neighbors between cyan and magenta. Get every tile the same color before time runs out! Grids grow from 3×3 to 6×6 while combo multipliers reward consecutive solves!
tagline: Flip the tiles. Make them match. Beat the clock.
controls: Click / Tap any tile to flip it and its neighbors

name: Crystal Swap
description: Swap adjacent neon gems on a 7×7 grid to create matches of 3 or more in a row or column — chain cascade combos for massive multipliers and race the 90-second clock to maximize your score!
tagline: Swap gems. Chain combos. Beat the clock.
controls: Click a gem, then click an adjacent gem to swap

name: Beam Dodge
description: Guide a neon orb with your mouse through a storm of rotating laser beams — collect glowing crystals for points, chain pickups for combo multipliers, and survive as beams multiply and accelerate!
tagline: Dodge the lasers. Collect the crystals. Don't get burned.
controls: Move mouse / touch to guide your orb — dodge beams, collect crystals

name: Pocket Rush
description: Drag back from the white cue ball to aim and shoot — pocket all neon colored balls to advance levels! Chain consecutive pockets for massive combo multipliers and race the clock!
tagline: Aim. Shoot. Chain the pockets!
controls: Click and drag to aim cue ball — release to shoot | Touch drag on mobile

name: Merge Surge
description: Slide neon tiles on a 4×4 grid to merge matching numbers — each merge adds precious seconds to your countdown timer. Chain consecutive merges for massive combo multipliers and race to post the highest score before time runs out!
tagline: Slide. Merge. Survive the countdown.
controls: ← → ↑ ↓ or WASD to slide tiles | Swipe on mobile

name: Helix Drop
description: A ball falls through spinning neon disc rings — hold left/right to rotate the entire tower and align each gap with the ball's path before it crashes. Chain passes for massive combo multipliers as rings spin faster each level!
tagline: Rotate the tower. Thread the gaps. Don't get blocked.
controls: ← → Arrow Keys or A/D to rotate tower | Swipe left/right on mobile

name: Grav Shift
description: Roll a glowing neon ball through a maze by shifting gravity in 4 directions — collect all cyan gems to open the golden portal exit, and dodge red spikes that cost you a life!
tagline: Shift gravity. Collect gems. Reach the portal.
controls: ← → ↑ ↓ or WASD to shift gravity direction | Swipe on mobile

name: Nova Pulse
description: Hold to expand a glowing ring outward from the center and hit bouncing neon balls — chain multiple hits per expansion for massive combo multipliers, but release before the ring overflows or lose a life!
tagline: Hold to expand. Hit the balls. Don't overflow.
controls: Hold Mouse / Touch / Space to expand ring — release to contract

name: Brick Blitz
description: Drag to aim a volley of neon balls and blast numbered HP bricks — collect +1 orbs to grow your ball count, chain destruction combos for massive scores, and don't let bricks reach the red line!
tagline: Aim. Shoot. Smash every brick!
controls: Click and drag upward to aim — release to fire all balls | Touch drag on mobile

name: Cipher Blitz
description: Crack the hidden neon color code in 8 guesses — gold dots mean right color and right spot, silver dots mean right color wrong spot. Race a 90-second timer across multiple rounds as codes grow longer and harder each level!
tagline: Deduce the code. Beat the clock. Chain the solves.
controls: Click a color, then click a peg slot to place it — press Submit or Enter to check your guess

name: Sky Surge
description: Bounce a glowing neon ball upward through endless procedurally generated platforms — ride spring pads for super jumps, dodge crumbling platforms, collect gems for bonus points, and survive as platforms grow narrower and faster!
tagline: Bounce up. Don't fall. Reach the sky!
controls: ← → or A/D to move left/right | Touch left/right side on mobile

name: Chromatic Drop
description: Catch falling neon balls that match your basket's colour — rainbow orbs shift your basket hue, ×2 orbs double your points, and chain perfect catches for explosive combo multipliers as balls rain faster each level!
tagline: Match the colour. Chain the catches. Don't miss!
controls: Move mouse / touch to guide basket | ← → or A/D keys

name: Neon Smash
description: Smash glowing neon targets that pop up from a 4×3 grid — hit the cyan, green, and yellow ones for combo-multiplied points, but avoid the red bombs or lose a life! Speed escalates as your score climbs.
tagline: Pop the targets. Dodge the bombs. Chain the combos!
controls: Click / Tap glowing targets — avoid red bombs!

name: Juggle Rush
description: Keep multiple neon balls in the air by clicking or tapping near them before they hit the danger zone — chain combo hits for massive multipliers as gravity increases and more balls spawn over time!
tagline: Click to bounce. Don't let them drop!
controls: Click / Tap near a falling ball to bounce it up — keep all balls in the air!

name: Bubble Blitz
description: Aim a neon cannon and shoot colored bubbles into a hex grid — match clusters of 3 or more to pop them in particle bursts, chain combos for massive multipliers, and clear the board before bubbles reach the danger line!
tagline: Aim. Shoot. Pop. Chain the neon!
controls: Move mouse to aim cannon · Click / tap to shoot · Space to fire

name: Pendulum Rush
description: Swing a glowing neon ball on a rope between anchor points — click to attach and detach, chain orb collections for massive combo multipliers, and dodge spinning spike enemies before they take your last life!
tagline: Swing the rope. Collect the orbs. Don't get spiked.
controls: Click / Tap / Space to attach rope to nearest anchor — click again to release

name: Ricochet Rush
description: Fire bouncing neon bullets off the walls to blast glowing targets — aim carefully, chain consecutive hits for massive combo multipliers, and rack up the highest score in 90 seconds!
tagline: Bounce bullets. Hit targets. Chain the combos!
controls: Move mouse to aim · Click / Tap above cannon to fire bouncing bullet

name: Chromagate
description: Rotate a neon color-wheel so the matching segment is at the top when a falling colored orb arrives — chain perfect matches for massive combo multipliers as the wheel gains more segments and orbs speed up each level!
tagline: Spin the wheel. Match the orb. Chain the combos!
controls: ← → or A/D to rotate wheel | Swipe left/right on mobile

name: Sequence Rush
description: Neon numbered orbs are scattered randomly across the screen — click them in ascending order (1, 2, 3…) as fast as you can before the countdown expires! Chain perfect clicks for massive combo multipliers and race for the highest score across escalating rounds!
tagline: Find the numbers. Click in order. Beat the clock!
controls: Click / Tap numbered orbs in ascending order

name: Spin Frenzy
description: Keep multiple neon spinning tops from stopping — click or tap each top to boost its spin before it winds down to zero! More tops on screen means more points per second, but they all slow down faster as difficulty ramps up.
tagline: Keep them spinning. Don't let a single one stop!
controls: Click / Tap a spinning top to boost its speed — keep all tops spinning!

name: Peg Drop
description: Drop 10 neon balls through a staggered peg field — aim carefully to hit the glowing JACKPOT bucket for 2000 pts, and chain consecutive center-zone drops for massive combo multipliers!
tagline: Drop the ball. Hit the JACKPOT. Chain the combos!
controls: Move mouse to aim · Click / Tap at the top to drop a neon ball

name: Orbit Frenzy
description: Orbit a glowing star on two concentric neon rings — click or tap to hop between the inner and outer orbit, dodge color-coded rotating laser spokes, and chain gem collections for massive combo multipliers!
tagline: Orbit the star. Dodge the spokes. Chain the gems!
controls: Click / Tap / Space to switch between inner and outer orbit — dodge cyan, purple, and orange spokes (orange bright half = danger!)

name: Neon Conduit
description: Rotate neon pipe tiles to connect the glowing SOURCE node to the SINK — click any tile to spin it 90°, chain level completions for massive combo multipliers, and race the countdown clock!
tagline: Rotate the pipes. Connect the flow. Beat the clock!
controls: Click / Tap any pipe tile to rotate it 90° clockwise — connect S to X before time runs out

name: Neon Morph
description: Shape-shift your neon runner between WIDE and TALL forms to thread through horizontal and vertical gap obstacles — chain gap passes and gem pickups for massive combo multipliers as the speed escalates!
tagline: Morph your shape. Thread the gap. Never stop!
controls: Click / Tap / Space to morph between WIDE and TALL forms

name: Neon Swarm
description: Blast waves of glowing alien invaders in this neon Space Invaders-style shooter — move your ship left and right to dodge enemy fire, collect power-ups for rapid-fire, shields, and spread shots, and chain kills for massive combo multipliers!
tagline: Blast the swarm. Dodge the bullets. Survive the onslaught!
controls: Move mouse / touch to aim ship · Hold click / Space to fire · ← → Arrow keys to dodge

name: Swarm Rush
description: Guide a cloud of 30 neon particles toward glowing gems using your mouse — the swarm follows with spring physics and natural bloom spreading. Avoid pulsing red void circles that absorb your particles, chain gem collects for massive combo multipliers, and survive as more voids spawn each level!
tagline: Guide the swarm. Engulf the gems. Don't get absorbed!
controls: Move mouse / drag to guide your neon particle swarm toward gems

name: Grid Siege
description: Claim territory by drawing trails through the neon grid — reconnect to safe ground to capture enclosed regions! Bouncing enemies destroy your active trail, so plan each cut carefully and claim 75% to advance each level.
tagline: Draw trails. Claim the grid. Don't get hit!
controls: Arrow Keys / WASD to move · D-pad buttons on mobile

name: Sprint Surge
description: Alternate A/D keys (or tap left/right) as fast as possible to build running speed — then time Space or a center tap to leap over glowing neon hurdles! Speed decays if you stop stepping, so keep the rhythm going and chain hurdle clears for massive combo multipliers!
tagline: Alternate your feet. Build the surge. Clear every hurdle!
controls: A / ← then D / → alternate to sprint · Space / ↑ to jump | Tap L · Center · R on mobile

name: Voltage Jump
description: Leap between glowing hexagonal platforms that pulse with electric charge — click to jump and land when the platform is bright for PERFECT timing! Predict travel time to nail combos as platforms pulse faster each level.
tagline: Jump when it glows. Land in the light. Chain the voltage!
controls: Click / Tap a platform to jump to it — land when the charge ring is FULL for PERFECT score

name: Lasso Rush
description: Click and drag to throw a neon lasso circle around drifting glowing enemies — release to capture all inside! Smaller lassos earn huge efficiency bonuses, and catching 3+ at once triggers a COMBO explosion. Race the 90-second clock for the highest score!
tagline: Cast the lasso. Rope the herd. Chain the combos!
controls: Click and drag to cast a lasso circle — release to capture enemies inside

name: Neon Archer
description: Hold to charge your neon bow and fire arrows at a glowing target — compensate for the wind blowing your shot sideways to nail the bullseye! Chain consecutive high-ring hits for massive combo multipliers across 12 arrows.
tagline: Charge the bow. Read the wind. Hit the bullseye!
controls: Hold mouse / touch to charge bow · Release to fire · Aim into the wind to compensate

name: Neon Ripple
description: Tap anywhere to launch expanding shockwave rings that destroy glowing enemies they pass through — chain kills for massive combo multipliers, and watch out for white-ringed pulse enemies that burst into chain ripples when destroyed!
tagline: Tap to ripple. Destroy the swarm. Chain the waves!
controls: Click / Tap anywhere to launch an expanding shockwave ring

name: Polarity Rush
description: Hold to activate your magnetic field and attract all orbs toward the center — cyan orbs score points but red orbs cost you a life! Release to repel everything safely. Time your attract bursts and chain cyan catches for massive combo multipliers!
tagline: Hold to attract. Release to survive.
controls: Hold mouse / touch / Space to attract orbs · Release to repel them

name: Volt Chain
description: Click glowing hexagonal posts to chain a live electric arc before its energy ring drains — the farther the next post, the higher the risk and reward! Color-coded posts multiply your score: gold gives 3×, purple 2×, and cyan keeps the chain alive. Don't let the energy die or you lose a life!
tagline: Chain the arc. Don't let the energy die!
controls: Click / Tap a glowing hexagonal post within range to chain the electric arc

name: Tilt Rush
description: Move your mouse left and right to tilt a glowing neon balance beam — keep falling neon blocks from sliding off! More blocks balanced at once means bigger combo multipliers and higher scores.
tagline: Tilt the beam. Keep the balance. Don't let them fall!
controls: Move mouse left/right to tilt the beam | Drag finger on mobile

name: Storm Dash
description: Tap anywhere to instantly teleport your neon orb away from incoming lightning bolts — warning lines flash before each strike so you must react fast! Collect glowing cyan gems for combo-multiplied points while dodging an ever-thickening storm.
tagline: Teleport to survive. Collect the gems. Outrun the storm!
controls: Click / Tap anywhere to instantly teleport your orb — dodge lightning, collect cyan gems

name: Sync Burst
description: Multiple neon pulse zones fill the screen, each expanding and contracting at its own rhythm — click each zone exactly when its ring aligns with the dashed target ring for PERFECT timing! Ignore a zone too long and it drains a life; chain consecutive precise hits for massive combo multipliers as new zones appear and pressure builds!
tagline: Time the rings. Keep all zones alive. Chain the burst!
controls: Click / Tap a zone when its pulse ring aligns with the dashed target ring

name: Neon Slide
description: Slide glowing neon tiles back into order 1–8 on a 3×3 grid before the countdown expires — earn time bonuses for quick solves, chain consecutive completions for massive combo multipliers, and race through escalating levels as the puzzle shuffles deeper each round!
tagline: Slide the chaos. Solve the grid. Beat the clock!
controls: Click / Tap a tile adjacent to the empty gap to slide it into place

name: Fuse Rush
description: Multiple neon bombs tick down simultaneously — click them in order of shortest fuse first to defuse! Wrong order or letting any bomb explode costs a life. Chain defusals for massive combo multipliers as more bombs spawn and fuses shorten each level!
tagline: Click the shortest fuse first. Don't let them blow!
controls: Click / Tap the bomb with the shortest time remaining first — defuse in urgency order!

name: Hyper Dash
description: An auto-running neon sprinter dodges red spike clusters by jumping (with double-jump!) and slides under purple ceiling barriers — chain clean obstacle clears for massive combo multipliers and collect glowing diamonds as speed escalates to warp level!
tagline: Jump the spikes. Duck the barriers. Never stop running!
controls: Space / Click to jump (double-jump available) · ↓ / S to duck | Tap to jump, swipe down to duck on mobile

name: Neon Puck
description: Move your mouse to control a glowing cyan paddle in neon air hockey against an escalating AI — angle your shots to thread the goal, collect power-ups for wide paddles and speed boosts, and chain consecutive goals for massive combo multipliers across endless rounds!
tagline: Slide the puck. Score the goal. Beat the AI!
controls: Move mouse or drag finger to steer your paddle · W = Wide paddle · F = Fast puck · S = Slow AI (collect mid-table power-ups)

name: Chroma Shift
description: A neon orb hurtles through colorful gates — switch your orb's color to match each incoming gate before it hits you! Chain correct color matches for massive combo multipliers as gates speed up and spawn faster each level!
tagline: Shift your color. Match the gate. Chain the combos!
controls: Press 1 2 3 4 to switch orb color · ↑ / ↓ arrows cycle colors | Tap color buttons on mobile

name: Junction Rush
description: Manage a neon 4-way traffic intersection — click to toggle signals between north-south and east-west green, let cars flow safely through, and prevent perpendicular cars from crashing! Chain consecutive safe passes for massive combo multipliers as traffic grows faster each level.
tagline: Toggle the signal. Clear the cars. Prevent the crash!
controls: Click / Tap / Space to toggle traffic signal between N-S and E-W green

name: Wall Breach
description: A neon wall scrolls toward you with a cut-out hole pattern — click tiles on your 4×4 grid to toggle them ON and match the dashed cyan gaps before impact! Chain successful passes for massive combo multipliers as walls speed up each level.
tagline: Match your shape. Break through the wall!
controls: Click / Tap tiles to toggle them ON — match the cyan dashed hole pattern in the incoming wall

name: Neon Boomerang
description: Click to aim and throw a glowing neon boomerang — it curves along a bezier arc to your target and sweeps back! Hit multiple targets in one throw for explosive combo multipliers, and chain consecutive successful throws for even bigger scores!
tagline: Aim. Throw. Curve through the targets. Chain the combos!
controls: Click / Tap anywhere to throw boomerang toward that point — preview arc shown on hover

name: Neon Pairs
description: Flip neon cards to find matching symbol pairs — chain consecutive matches for explosive combo multipliers and clear every pair before the countdown expires!
tagline: Flip. Match. Chain the combos!
controls: Click / Tap any face-down card to flip it — find its matching pair to score

name: Chromawave
description: Colorful waves surge down four neon lanes — dash to the matching colored zone before each wave crashes! Chain consecutive correct catches for explosive combo multipliers as waves speed up and multiply.
tagline: Dash to your color. Catch the wave. Chain the combos!
controls: ← → or A D to move between zones · 1 2 3 4 for instant zone jump | Tap a zone on mobile

name: Neon Drift
description: Steer a glowing neon car along a procedurally curving road — stay on the tarmac, collect diamond gems for combo multipliers, and survive as the road narrows and the speed climbs to warp level!
tagline: Stay on the road. Collect gems. Survive the speed!
controls: ← → or A / D to steer | Tap left / right side on mobile

name: Whip Rush
description: A neon ball orbits a glowing hub on a tether — click to instantly reverse its orbit direction and smash incoming enemies before they breach the center! Chain consecutive kills for massive combo multipliers as enemies grow faster and more numerous each level.
tagline: Reverse the orbit. Smash the enemies. Chain the kills!
controls: Click / Tap / Space to reverse orbit direction — smash enemies with the whipping ball

name: Surge Line
description: Move your mouse to aim a horizontal electric zap line across the full screen — click to fire a surge that destroys every enemy at that height! Wait for enemies to align for x2, x3, or x4 combo multipliers as waves grow faster each level.
tagline: Aim the surge. Zap the row. Chain the combos!
controls: Move mouse / drag to aim the horizontal zap line · Click / Tap to fire the electric surge

name: Ring Roll
description: A glowing ball rolls inside a rotating neon ring under gravity — click to reverse the ring's direction and guide the ball to collect every diamond gem while avoiding electrified red hazard zones on the wall!
tagline: Reverse the ring. Roll the ball. Collect the gems!
controls: Click / Tap / Space to reverse the ring rotation direction

name: Arc Surge
description: Fire gravity-affected ballistic shots at drifting neon targets — predict where each target will be when your parabolic arc arrives, chain consecutive hits for massive combo multipliers, and survive 90 seconds before time runs out!
tagline: Aim the arc. Lead the target. Chain the combos!
controls: Move mouse to aim · Hold to charge power (ring grows) · Release to fire · Longer hold = more range

name: Blade Ring
description: Throw neon blades into a spinning disc — time each throw so your blade doesn't hit one already embedded! Golden gem diamonds score +100 bonus points as the disc speeds up and reverses direction each round.
tagline: Time the throw. Don't hit a blade. Chain the combos!
controls: Click / Tap to throw a blade into the spinning disc

name: Trail Blaze
description: Steer your neon light cycle to outlast two AI opponents — leave glowing trails that eliminate anyone who crosses them! Chain AI kills for massive combo multipliers as the speed escalates each wave.
tagline: Blaze the trail. Cut off the AI. Don't cross the neon!
controls: Arrow Keys / WASD to turn · Tap above/below or left/right of your head on mobile

name: Prism Sum
description: Click numbered neon prisms on a 5×4 grid that add up to the glowing target — chain consecutive matches for explosive combo multipliers and race the 90-second countdown!
tagline: Pick the prisms. Hit the target. Chain the combos!
controls: Click / Tap numbered prisms whose values sum to the target number

name: Shell Rush
description: Watch the glowing neon card reveal, then track it through rapid shuffles — pick the right card to score! Cards, swaps, and speed all escalate as your combo multiplier climbs.
tagline: Track the glow. Beat the shuffle. Chain the combos!
controls: Click / Tap the card you tracked through the shuffle

name: String Strike
description: Enemies ride neon harp strings toward the glowing center node — click to unleash a vertical shockwave that ripples across ALL strings simultaneously, destroying every enemy the wave front touches! Chain multi-string kills for massive combo multipliers.
tagline: Click to shockwave. Chain the kills. Protect the strings!
controls: Click / Tap anywhere to send a shockwave across all strings — destroy enemies before they reach the center!

name: Neon Dice Rush
description: Roll 5 neon dice and lock the keepers — reroll up to 3 times per turn to build scoring combos! Chain consecutive high-scoring turns for massive multipliers and race the 90-second clock!
tagline: Roll. Lock. Score. Chain the combos!
controls: Click / Tap dice to lock them · Click ROLL to reroll · Click SCORE to bank your combo

name: Snap Lock
description: Two neon scanlines sweep the field independently — click to fire when their crosshair intersection locks on a glowing target! PERFECT hits earn massive points; chain consecutive locks for explosive combo multipliers before targets expire!
tagline: Lock the crosshair. Fire the shot. Chain the combos!
controls: Click / Tap to fire when the scanning crosshair is over a target

name: Blast Zone
description: Navigate a neon arena and place timed bombs to blast glowing enemies — chain multi-kills for massive combo multipliers, collect power-ups to boost range and bomb count, and clear all enemies to advance!
tagline: Place bombs. Chain kills. Clear the zone!
controls: Arrow Keys / WASD to move · Space / Z to place bomb · Mobile D-pad buttons

name: Card Rush
description: Neon playing cards slide past in 4 lanes — click to grab 5 cards and build the best poker hand! Chain hands for combo multipliers as cards speed up each round.
tagline: Grab 5 cards. Build the best hand. Chain the combos!
controls: Click / Tap sliding cards to grab them — collect 5 for a poker hand · DISCARD button resets held cards

name: Neon Word Hunt
description: Drag across a glowing 8×8 letter grid to find hidden words — horizontal, vertical, or diagonal! Chain consecutive finds for explosive combo multipliers and race the 90-second clock!
tagline: Drag to spell. Find the words. Chain the combos!
controls: Click and drag across adjacent letters to spell hidden words — any direction!

name: Mirror Blaze
description: Redirect a glowing laser beam using / and \ mirrors on a neon grid to hit all targets simultaneously — chain level completions for massive combo multipliers as puzzles grow more complex each round!
tagline: Place mirrors. Redirect the laser. Hit all targets!
controls: Click an empty cell to place a / mirror · Click again for \ · Click again to remove

name: Neon Infiltrator
description: Sneak a glowing cyan agent across a 10×10 neon grid — dodge rotating yellow spotlight cones from orange guard sentinels and reach the golden vault before getting caught! Chain level completions for massive combo multipliers.
tagline: Dodge the spotlights. Crack the vault. Don't get caught!
controls: Arrow Keys / WASD to move one cell at a time | Tap D-pad on mobile

name: Neon Strike
description: Move your glowing ball along the lane to aim, hold to charge power, then release to bowl — scatter neon pins with chain-reaction physics, chain consecutive strikes for massive combo multipliers, and survive 3 gutter balls before game over!
tagline: Aim. Charge. Bowl. Chain the strikes!
controls: Move mouse to aim · Hold mouse button to charge power · Release to bowl | Drag on mobile

name: Neon Fortress
description: Build neon turrets on a grid to defend against 10 waves of glowing hexagon invaders — place Laser, Plasma, and Nova towers strategically to stop enemies before they reach the base!
tagline: Place towers. Hold the line. Survive 10 waves!
controls: Click empty grid cells to place towers · Select tower type in HUD · Enemies auto-targeted by towers

name: Skeet Surge
description: Neon clay discs launch from the edges in parabolic arcs — aim your crosshair and click to blast them before they escape! Chain consecutive hits for massive combo multipliers and precision bullseye bonuses.
tagline: Aim the crosshair. Blast the disc. Chain the combos!
controls: Move mouse to aim crosshair · Click / Tap to shoot at flying neon discs

name: Neon Bloom
description: Neon flowers spring to life on a 5×5 grid, each pulsing through bud, bloom, and wither stages. Click flowers at peak bloom for maximum points and combo multipliers — but miss the window and they'll wither, costing you a life!
tagline: Time your harvest. Catch the bloom. Chain the neon!
controls: Click / Tap blooming flowers at peak glow for max points · Harvest combos for score multipliers

name: Sling Smash
description: Pull back a neon slingshot and blast glowing HP blocks — aim for chain-reaction combos, rack up points across 5 escalating levels, and smash every block before your shots run out!
tagline: Pull back. Aim. Smash the neon blocks!
controls: Click and drag left side to pull slingshot · Release to fire · Aim for chain combos!

name: Hue Rush
description: A neon Stroop challenge — color words flash on screen in a mismatched ink color. Click the actual INK color as fast as you can, chain correct answers for massive combo multipliers, and survive 90 seconds before time runs out!
tagline: Read the color, not the word. Beat the confusion!
controls: Click / Tap the color button matching the INK color of the displayed word

name: Fusion Drop
description: Drop neon orbs into a container and merge matching pairs into larger ones — chain cascade merges for massive scores before the stack overflows!
tagline: Drop. Merge. Chain the fusion!
controls: Move mouse to aim · Click / Tap to drop an orb · Match same orbs to merge

name: Cargo Pulse
description: Navigate a glowing grid and push the neon cargo crate along the magenta conduit onto the pulsing pad — clear levels fast and efficiently to chain massive combo multipliers before time runs out!
tagline: Push the cargo. Hit the pulse. Chain the clears!
controls: Arrow Keys / WASD / on-screen D-pad to walk and push the crate

name: Vector Slash
description: Glowing neon orbs spawn across the screen, each branded with a directional arrow — swipe through them in the exact direction shown to slash them apart! Chain correct-direction hits for massive combo multipliers, but a wrong-way swipe shatters your combo and a missed orb costs a life.
tagline: Read the arrow. Swipe the vector. Slash with precision!
controls: Click and drag / swipe through an orb in the direction of its arrow to slash it

name: Claw Rush
description: A neon claw swings across columns of glowing hexagonal gems — time your drop to grab the target-colored gem and chain correct picks for massive combo multipliers! Empty columns cost a life.
tagline: Swing the claw. Grab the target. Chain the combos!
controls: Click / Tap / Space to drop the claw — time it over the target-colored gem column

name: Resonance Rush
description: Tune your frequency wave to match the shifting target wave before your signal stability runs out — lock onto resonance for points, combos, and rising levels.
tagline: Find the frequency. Feel the resonance. Don't lose the signal.
controls: Move mouse / touch up and down (or Arrow Up/Down) to tune your wave's frequency to the target

name: Fulcrum Frenzy
description: Catch falling weights and drop them on the left or right pan of a giant seesaw, keeping the balance needle in the green zone for combo-building perfect catches while red bombs and golden weights raise the stakes.
tagline: Balance the load. Ride the tilt. Don't crash the scale!
controls: ← / A : drop on left pan · → / D : drop on right pan | Tap left/right zones on mobile

name: Neon Trace
description: Drag the glowing dot along ever-changing neon shapes - circles, waves, stars, spirals, hearts and more - chaining perfect traces for combo multipliers before each shape's timer burns out.
tagline: Trace the glow. Chase the dot. Chain the precision!
controls: Click/tap and drag the glowing dot along the neon path · Release to stop tracing

name: Phantom Drift
description: Glide through a neon arena collecting gems while glowing echoes of your own past movements replay a few seconds behind you - drift away from your old paths before they solidify into hazards that can take your lives.
tagline: Outrun your past. Don't get caught by your own echo.
controls: Move mouse / touch, or WASD / Arrow keys to drift your orb, collect gems, and dodge hazards and echoes of your past self

name: Forge Ahead
description: Your glowing orb races forever forward along a crumbling neon track. A diamond marker lights up the tile just ahead before your orb arrives over a gap - tap or press space in that instant to forge a new tile and keep the track alive. Chain consecutive forges for combo multipliers and watch for golden gaps worth triple points.
tagline: Forge the track before you fall through it.
controls: Click, tap, or press Space / ArrowUp / W the instant the diamond marker lights up over a gap to forge a new tile

name: Critical Mass
description: Manage a glowing neon reactor core teetering on the edge of meltdown. Hit CHARGE to pump Energy and ramp up your score rate, but every charge raises Heat. Hit VENT to cool the core back down before it overloads. Keep the Heat ring inside the green sweet zone to build a combo multiplier up to x6 - let it hit 100% and the reactor goes critical, costing you a core. Lose all 3 cores and it's meltdown.
tagline: Charge it, vent it, don't let it go critical.
controls: Click/tap the CHARGE and VENT buttons, or press Up/W/Space to charge and Down/S to vent, to balance Heat and Energy

name: Drone Protocol
description: Program a recon drone to cross a hazard grid one command at a time. Queue UP / DOWN / LEFT / RIGHT moves with the D-pad or arrow keys, then hit RUN to watch your drone execute the route step by step. Land exactly on the goal while dodging warning hazards and the grid's edge - match the optimal step count for a PERFECT PATH bonus, and chain clears without a crash to build a combo multiplier up to x5. Crash or fall off the grid and you lose a drone; lose all three and the signal is lost.
tagline: Plan the route, then watch it fly - or crash.
controls: Tap the D-pad arrows or press Arrow keys / WASD to queue moves, then click RUN or press Enter/Space to execute; Backspace undoes the last move

name: Crest Diver
description: Hold to dive your glowing orb down procedurally rolling neon hills, building speed on the downslopes and launching off every crest. Thread golden rings in mid-air for combo multipliers, scoop up cyan energy orbs, and dodge red spike hazards as the terrain grows wilder the farther you go.
tagline: Dive the slope. Launch the crest. Chain the rings.
controls: Hold mouse / touch / Space to dive down slopes — release to glide and launch off crests through the gold rings

name: Flip Field
description: Instantly flip gravity to dodge spike walls jutting from the ceiling and floor of a neon tunnel, thread narrow double-spike gates by hovering mid-air, and scoop up glowing orbs as the corridor accelerates.
tagline: One tap. Flip the field. Thread the spikes.
controls: Click / Tap / Space to instantly flip gravity direction

name: Neon Herd
description: Move your cursor near glowing sheep to repel them — guide the whole flock through the golden gate using only your cursor's repulsion field! Chain consecutive sheep through for massive combo multipliers as the gate shrinks each level.
tagline: Repel the sheep. Guide the flock. Don't lose the herd!
controls: Move mouse / touch to repel glowing sheep — guide them through the golden gate on the right

name: Vial Rush
description: Pour neon liquids between glass vials to sort each one to a single color — plan your pours carefully, chain fast level completions for massive combo multipliers, and race the countdown clock!
tagline: Pour. Sort. Chain the combos!
controls: Click / Tap a vial to select it, then click another vial to pour the top color

name: Fracture Rush
description: Glowing orange cracks tear across a neon hexagon — click on the crack lines to seal them before they spread fully across the shape! Chain fast heals for massive combo multipliers and survive as cracks spawn faster each level.
tagline: Click the cracks. Seal the shape. Don't let it shatter!
controls: Click / Tap on glowing crack lines to seal them before they spread fully across the shape

name: Relay Rush
description: Colored neon signals race along 4 glowing rails — click switch nodes to redirect them to their matching colored exit terminals before they short-circuit! Chain correct routings for massive combo multipliers as signals get faster each level.
tagline: Route the signals. Don't short-circuit!
controls: Click / Tap switch nodes to toggle between straight and cross — route each signal to its matching colored exit

name: Tangle Rush
description: Drag glowing nodes to untangle a knotted neon web — get every edge crossing to zero before time runs out! Chain fast level completions for massive combo multipliers as the graph grows more complex each round.
tagline: Drag the nodes. Untangle the web. Beat the clock!
controls: Click and drag glowing nodes to move them — untangle all edge crossings to complete each level

name: Chroma Bounce
description: A neon ball bounces automatically around the screen — change its color to match glowing timed zones and nudge it into them before they expire! Chain zone fills for massive combo multipliers.
tagline: Change the color. Nudge the ball. Hit the zone!
controls: Click canvas to nudge ball · Keys 1-2-3-4 or color buttons to change ball color · Match color to zone and bounce into it

name: Cell Surge
description: Guide your glowing neon cell with your mouse — absorb smaller orbs to grow and rack up points, but dodge massive red predators that will shrink you! Chain rapid absorptions for combo multipliers up to 8×.
tagline: Absorb. Grow. Dominate the neon arena!
controls: Move mouse / touch to guide your neon cell — absorb smaller orbs, dodge red predators

name: Depth Surge
description: Dive a glowing neon orb through a dark ocean — buoyancy floats you up, but hold to plunge down and thread through neon purple barrier walls! Collect glowing cyan and gold gems for combo-multiplied points while keeping safe between the deadly surface spikes and seafloor fangs.
tagline: Hold to dive. Release to rise. Thread the gaps!
controls: Hold mouse / touch / Space to dive down · Release to float up

name: Neon Cleave
description: Drag a cleaving line through drifting neon geometric shapes — the closer your cut passes through the exact center, the higher the PERFECT bonus! Chain accurate cleaves for massive combo multipliers and race the 90-second clock.
tagline: Slice through the center. Chain the PERFECT cleaves!
controls: Click and drag across a shape to cleave it — aim your line through the shape's center dot for PERFECT!

name: Nova Pop
description: Neon orbs grow on-screen and will supernova if you let them reach full size. Click to pop them — nearby same-color orbs chain-explode in a cascade of shockwaves and particles. Let orbs grow big for massive chain combos, but one supernova ends the run.
tagline: Pop before they blow — chain the combos!
controls: Click / Tap an orb to pop it — same-color orbs nearby chain-explode for combo points
